patch.insert_text: Uses OTC naproxen 220 mg with food, one to two times per week, for hand pain.
added_claims: Patient takes over-the-counter naproxen 220 mg with food, one to two times per week, for hand pain

reasons: Evidence explicitly states OTC naproxen 220 mg, one to two times weekly, with food; 'for hand pain' is contextually supported.
Naproxen use is not mentioned elsewhere in the note (which otherwise says 'no medications'), so this adds new information.
Patient-reported medication use belongs in the Subjective section.
